# Deep Dive Films

> Brooklyn-based branded edutainment video production studio. We make documentary films that educate your audience and build your brand.

Deep Dive Films sits at the intersection of documentary filmmaking and brand strategy. We produce branded edutainment — content that teaches audiences something they genuinely want to know while achieving specific commercial outcomes for the brand.

## What we do

- **Brand & People**: Founder origin stories, culture films, executive profiles, "Why We Exist" films
- **Customer & Community**: Long-form customer success stories, transformation narratives, community impact documentaries
- **Industry & Platform**: Expert interview series, industry trend documentaries, episodic docu-series

## Formats

- Mini-Film (3–7 min): The workhorse format for digital distribution
- Documentary Series (3–8 episodes): Episodic content that builds an audience over time
- Long-Form Doc (12–45 min): Full cinematic treatment for brand origin and impact stories
- Distribution Cuts (30 sec–2 min): Platform-optimized cuts included with every production

## Why it works

Consumers are 131% more likely to buy after consuming educational content (Conductor/Cornell). Deep Dive productions average 55% view-through rate — against a 2% industry benchmark for branded video. The difference is authentic storytelling that serves the audience first.

## Selected clients

Google, SurvivorNet, Meta, Harlem Capital, Ethereum Foundation

## Key proof points

- 55% average view-through rate (SurvivorNet documentary series)
- 131% purchase lift from educational content (Conductor/Cornell research)
- 89% of B2B decision-makers cite thought leadership as influential (Edelman-LinkedIn)

## Contact

- Website: https://deepdivefilms.com
- Email: hello@deepdivefilms.com
- Location: Brooklyn, NY
